nodes.description: AI-driven financial operators with constrained permissions, audit envelopes, escalation rules, and bounded autonomy.
nodes.name: agent

nodes.description: Escrow custody and conditional release for multi-party conditional financial workflows.
nodes.name: escrow

nodes.description: Constitutional oversight, amendment management, escalation handling, regulatory compliance tracking, and audit authority.
nodes.name: governance

nodes.description: Actor identification, authentication, credential management, and trust establishment.
nodes.name: identity

nodes.description: Human and agent intention translation, partial intent handling, enrichment pipelines, ambiguity resolution, and conversion from expressed intent to executable command.
nodes.name: intent

nodes.description: Immutable financial history, event-sourced truth, double-entry accounting, and complete audit trail.
nodes.name: ledger

nodes.description: Execution Boundary between constitutional runtime and external financial systems. Settlement adapters, reconciliation, receipts.
nodes.name: payment

nodes.description: Rule evaluation, compliance checking, risk assessment, authorization decisions, and constraint enforcement.
nodes.name: policy

nodes.description: Value movement, transfers, reserves, settlements, and liquidity management.
nodes.name: treasury

nodes.description: Asset custody, reserve accounting, collateral tracking, and asset-backed value representation.
nodes.name: vault

nodes.description: Pipeline for agent-initiated financial operations. Extends human execution pipeline with agent session verification, quota and concurrency checks, agent audit envelope wrapping, and dedicated agent completion/failure tracking.
Orchestrates the complete asset registration workflow. Triggered by vault.asset.register command.
Orchestrates asset verification with rollback compensation. Triggered by vault.asset.verify command.
Orchestrates cross-chain blockchain settlement. Triggered by hybrid.blockchain.settlement.requested event.

Pipeline for delegated financial operations. Extends human execution with delegation chain verification, delegation active status and limit checks, policy evaluation with delegation context, and verification that the original actor's authorization is valid within the delegation boundary.
Orchestrates delegation setup with rollback compensation. Triggered by identity.delegation.create command.

Handles policy escalation resolution. Triggered by policy.evaluation.escalated events. Notifies the configured escalation target (governance, human operator, or compliance officer), waits for resolution within a configurable timeout (auto-denies on expiry if configured), applies the resolution decision, resumes or cancels the original intent, and notifies the original actor.
Orchestrates external SOVR-to-external-system transfers. Triggered when treasury.transfer.authorized has settlement=EXTERNAL.

Full pipeline for human-initiated financial operations. Orchestrates identity authentication, policy evaluation, intent normalization, domain command execution, and ledger recording. Compensation reverses from ledger back through intent to policy evaluation.
Orchestrates the complete identity actor onboarding workflow. Triggered by identity.actor.create command.
Orchestrates internal SOVR-to-SOVR transfers. Triggered when treasury.transfer.authorized has settlement=INTERNAL.
Orchestrates oracle price feed reading with rollback compensation. Triggered by vault.valuation.update command.
Orchestrates payment adapter execution lifecycle. Triggered by payment.execution.execute command.

Handles governance policy review process. Governs the safe introduction of new policy rules by creating the rule in DRAFT state, activating it, notifying all affected domains, and verifying that no currently active operations are blocked by the newly activated rule. If active operations are disrupted, the rule is automatically deactivated as compensation.

Handles cases where authority cannot be determined, per INV-009. Flags the unknown authority state, escalates to governance for determination, waits for a governance decision within a configurable timeout, applies the governance decision (ALLOW, DENY, or MARK_UNKNOWN), and notifies the original actor. If governance cannot determine authority, the command is rejected via compensation.
Orchestrates periodic or triggered vault reconciliation. Triggered by vault.reconciliation.trigger event or scheduler.
